title: hieracium involutiforme
intro: Hieracium involutiforme, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Hieracium involutiforme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health problems.
